title: runtime external evidence-types non-pytest

narrative: I4.3 defines runtime external evidence types non pytest for the agent-driven expert system. Runtime & integration — IDE, SDK, headless, MCP tools. In practice, the system non-pytest evidence types—checksum files, screenshot paths, export manifests, linter reports—follow docs/operator/evidence-types.md so verify-router and headless-verify accept them alongside test logs, then operators extending evidence types update the manifest and add s0 validation where machine-checkable.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-i 2026-06-28 -->

Non-pytest evidence types—checksum files, screenshot paths, export manifests, linter reports—follow `docs/operator/evidence-types.md` so verify-router and headless-verify accept them alongside test logs. Task cards declare evidence type explicitly.

Mixed evidence bundles reference all paths in state evidence_files and journal Evidence files ([H4](H4-evidence.md)). Operators extending evidence types update the manifest and add S0 validation where machine-checkable.
